hours_worked_per_week.description: Number of hours worked per week (outside the home) by a married woman, denoted as y in the first-order model E(y) = β0 + β1x1 + β2x2.

years_of_education.description: Number of years of formal education completed by a married woman, denoted as x1 in the first-order model.

number_of_children.description: Number of children in the married woman's family, denoted as x2 in the first-order model.
